---
title: "BabyView Plots and Growth Curves"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, error = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
```

# Load Data

```{r load}
babyview_tokens_processed <-
  read_feather("../processed_data/babyview_tokens_processed.feather")

babyview_tokens_contract_processed <-
  read_feather("../processed_data/babyview_tokens_contract_processed.feather")
```

# Computing Cumulative Relative Frequencies

## Function vs. Content Words

```{r syncategory_relfreq}
syncategory_relfreq <-
  babyview_tokens_contract_processed %>%
  group_by(syncategory, age, speaker) %>%
  summarise(freq = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(speaker, age) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(freq), relfreq = freq / total, pct = relfreq * 100) %>%
  group_by(syncategory, speaker) %>%
  arrange(age) %>%
  mutate(
    cum_freq           = cumsum(freq),
    cum_total          = cumsum(total),
    cumulative_relfreq = cum_freq / cum_total,
    cumulative_pct     = cumulative_relfreq * 100
  )
```

## Individual Function Words

```{r functionword_relfreq}
functionword_relfreq <-
  babyview_tokens_contract_processed %>%
  group_by(word, age, speaker) %>%
  summarise(freq = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(speaker, age) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(freq), relfreq = freq / total, ppt = relfreq * 1000) %>%
  group_by(word, speaker) %>%
  arrange(age) %>%
  mutate(
    cum_freq           = cumsum(freq),
    cum_total          = cumsum(total),
    cumulative_relfreq = cum_freq / cum_total,
    cumulative_ppt     = cumulative_relfreq * 1000
  )
```

## Function Word Semantic Categories

```{r wordcategory_relfreq}
wordcategory_relfreq <-
  babyview_tokens_contract_processed %>%
  group_by(word_category, age, speaker) %>%
  summarise(freq = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(speaker, age) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(freq), relfreq = freq / total, ppt = relfreq * 1000) %>%
  group_by(word_category, speaker) %>%
  arrange(age) %>%
  mutate(
    cum_freq           = cumsum(freq),
    cum_total          = cumsum(total),
    cumulative_relfreq = cum_freq / cum_total
  )
```

# Plots

## Function vs. Content Word Production

```{r function_vs_content}
syncategory_relfreq %>%
  filter(speaker %in% c("child", "parent")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(age, pct)) +
  geom_point() +
  facet_grid(speaker ~ syncategory) +
  theme_bw() +
  xlab("Age (Months)") + ylab("Percentage")
```

## Word Plot Helper

```{r word_plot_fn}
word_plot <- function(w, min_age = NULL, speakers = c("child", "parent")) {
  d <- functionword_relfreq %>%
    filter(word == w, speaker %in% speakers)
  if (!is.null(min_age)) d <- filter(d, age > min_age)
  ggplot(d, aes(age, cumulative_ppt)) +
    geom_point() +
    facet_grid(. ~ speaker) +
    theme_bw() +
    xlab("Age (Months)") + ylab("Cumulative Parts Per Thousand") +
    ggtitle(w)
}
```

## Distribution of Individual Function Words

### Negation

```{r negation}
word_plot("no")
word_plot("not")
word_plot("n't")
```

### Yes

```{r yes}
word_plot("yes")
```

### Connectives

```{r connectives}
word_plot("and")
word_plot("or",      min_age = 20)
word_plot("if")
word_plot("but")
word_plot("because")
word_plot("unless")
word_plot("although")
```

### Articles

```{r articles}
word_plot("the")
word_plot("a")
```

### Demonstratives

```{r demonstratives}
word_plot("this")
word_plot("that")
word_plot("these")
word_plot("those")
```

### Wh-Words

```{r wh_words}
word_plot("what")
word_plot("who")
word_plot("when")
word_plot("where")
word_plot("why")
word_plot("how")
word_plot("whose")
word_plot("whom")
```

### Modals

```{r modals}
word_plot("can",   min_age = 12)
word_plot("could")
word_plot("need")
word_plot("maybe")
word_plot("might")
word_plot("must")
word_plot("should", min_age = 15)
```

### Quantifiers

```{r quantifiers}
word_plot("all")
word_plot("some")
word_plot("both")
word_plot("each")
word_plot("most",      min_age = 20)
word_plot("every")
word_plot("many")
word_plot("none")
word_plot("few")
word_plot("everyone")
word_plot("everybody")
word_plot("everything")
word_plot("someone",   min_age = 20)
word_plot("somebody",  min_age = 20)
word_plot("something")
word_plot("everywhere")
word_plot("somewhere")
```

### Temporal Quantifiers

```{r temporal_quantifiers}
word_plot("always")
word_plot("sometimes")
word_plot("usually")
word_plot("never",  min_age = 12)
word_plot("often")
word_plot("seldom")
word_plot("once")
word_plot("twice")
```

### Temporal Connectives

```{r temporal_connectives}
word_plot("before")
word_plot("after")
word_plot("then")
word_plot("until",  min_age = 21)
word_plot("during")
word_plot("while")
word_plot("since")
```

### Quantity

```{r quantity}
word_plot("more")
word_plot("less")
word_plot("much")
```

### Cardinals

```{r cardinals}
word_plot("one")
word_plot("two")
word_plot("three")
word_plot("four")
word_plot("five")
word_plot("six")
word_plot("seven", min_age = 10)
word_plot("eight")
word_plot("nine")
word_plot("ten")
```

### Ordinals

```{r ordinals}
word_plot("first")
word_plot("last")
word_plot("second", min_age = 22)
word_plot("third")
word_plot("fourth")
```

### Additives

```{r additives}
word_plot("again")
word_plot("too")
word_plot("also")
word_plot("another")
word_plot("still")
word_plot("other")
word_plot("others")
```

### Negative Polarity Items

```{r NPIs}
word_plot("any")
word_plot("yet")
word_plot("ever")
word_plot("anyone",  min_age = 23)
word_plot("anything")
word_plot("anywhere")
word_plot("anyway",  min_age = 15)
```

### Exclusives

```{r exclusives}
word_plot("only")
word_plot("just")
```

### Locatives

```{r locatives}
word_plot("here")
word_plot("there")
word_plot("up")
word_plot("on")
word_plot("in")
word_plot("out")
word_plot("outside")
word_plot("inside")
word_plot("down")
word_plot("into")
word_plot("under")
word_plot("above")
word_plot("below")
word_plot("over",   min_age = 12)
word_plot("behind")
word_plot("beside")
word_plot("between")
word_plot("beyond")
word_plot("near")
word_plot("onto",   min_age = 22)
word_plot("toward")
word_plot("along")
word_plot("across")
```

### Other

```{r other}
word_plot("so")
word_plot("either")
word_plot("neither")
word_plot("else")
word_plot("almost")
word_plot("already")
word_plot("except")
word_plot("for")
word_plot("from")
word_plot("to")
word_plot("by")
word_plot("very")
word_plot("with")
word_plot("without")
word_plot("instead", min_age = 23)
word_plot("such",    speakers = "child")
word_plot("about")
word_plot("whether")
```

### Pronouns

```{r pronouns}
word_plot("mine")
word_plot("me",     min_age = 12)
word_plot("i")
word_plot("you")
word_plot("your")
word_plot("yours")
word_plot("we")
word_plot("our")
word_plot("ours",   min_age = 12)
word_plot("she")
word_plot("her")
word_plot("hers",   min_age = 12)
word_plot("he")
word_plot("his",    min_age = 12)
word_plot("they")
word_plot("their")
word_plot("theirs")
word_plot("it")
word_plot("its")
```

### Auxiliaries

```{r auxiliaries}
word_plot("'m")
word_plot("am")
word_plot("is")
word_plot("are")
word_plot("was")
word_plot("were")
word_plot("do")
word_plot("does")
```

## Word Category Overview

```{r word_categories, fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
wordcategory_relfreq %>%
  filter(
    word_category != "nonfunction",
    speaker %in% c("child", "parent")
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(age, cumulative_relfreq, color = speaker)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ word_category, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_bw() +
  xlab("Age (Months)") + ylab("Cumulative Relative Frequency") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
